sentences.target: Der Geldautomat nimmt meine Karte nicht an.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈɡɛltʔaʊ̯toˌmaːt nɪmt ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈkaʁtə nɪçt an/

translations.de: Der Geldautomat nimmt meine Karte nicht an.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈɡɛltʔaʊ̯toˌmaːt nɪmt ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈkaʁtə nɪçt an/
translations.en: The ATM doesn't accept my card.
translations.es: El cajero automático no acepta mi tarjeta.
translations.fr: Le distributeur n'accepte pas ma carte.
translations.it: Il bancomat non accetta la mia carta.
translations.pt: O caixa eletrônico não aceita meu cartão.
translations.he: הכספומט לא מקבל את הכרטיס שלי.
translations.vi: Cây ATM không nhận thẻ của tôi.
translations.nl: De geldautomaat accepteert mijn pas niet.
translations.hu: Az ATM nem fogadja el a kártyámat.
translations.hi: एटीएम मेरा कार्ड स्वीकार नहीं कर रहा है।
translations.el: Το ATM δεν δέχεται την κάρτα μου.
translations.ja: ATMが私のカードを受け付けてくれません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'Geldautomat'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present of the separable verb 'annehmen'; main predicate.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with feminine accusative singular noun 'Karte' as its modifier.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'annehmen'.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase.
Separable verb particle completing 'annehmen'; placed at clause-final position.

sentences.target: Der Geldautomat ist heute außer Betrieb.

translations.de: Der Geldautomat ist heute außer Betrieb.
translations.en: The ATM is out of service today.
translations.es: El cajero automático está fuera de servicio hoy.
translations.fr: Le distributeur est hors service aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Il bancomat è fuori servizio oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这台取款机今天暂停服务。
translations.yue: 嗰部提款機今日暫停服務。
translations.pt: O caixa eletrônico está fora de serviço hoje.
translations.vi: Cây ATM hôm nay ngừng hoạt động.
translations.nl: De geldautomaat is vandaag buiten gebruik.
translations.hi: एटीएम आज काम नहीं कर रहा है।
translations.el: Το ATM είναι εκτός λειτουργίας σήμερα.
translations.nb: Minibanken er ute av drift i dag.
translations.ro: Bancomatul este în afara serviciului astăzi.
translations.da: Hæveautomaten er ude af drift i dag.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'Geldautomat'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb; situates the state in time.
Preposition governing dative; forms a fixed predicative phrase with 'Betrieb' ('außer Betrieb' = out of service).
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'außer' within the fixed expression functioning as predicative complement.

translations.es: El cajero nuevo vuelve a funcionar.
translations.fr: Le nouveau distributeur fonctionne à nouveau.
translations.it: Il nuovo bancomat funziona di nuovo.
translations.zh-Hans: 新的取款机又可以用了。
translations.pt: O novo caixa eletrônico voltou a funcionar.
translations.vi: Cây ATM mới lại hoạt động.
translations.ar: جهاز الصراف الجديد يعمل مرة أخرى.
translations.hi: नया एटीएम फिर से चल रहा है।
translations.ja: 新しいATMはまた使えます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'Geldautomat'.
Attributive adjective, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Geldautomat'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive main predicate meaning 'to work/operate'.
Adverb indicating repetition/return to a previous state; modifies the verb.

sentences.target: Der Geldautomat steht gleich neben der Bäckerei.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈɡɛltʔaʊ̯toˌmaːt ʃteːt ɡlaɪ̯ç ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ bɛkəˈʁaɪ̯/

translations.de: Der Geldautomat steht gleich neben der Bäckerei.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈɡɛltʔaʊ̯toˌmaːt ʃteːt ɡlaɪ̯ç ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ bɛkəˈʁaɪ̯/
translations.en: The ATM is right next to the bakery.
translations.es: El cajero automático está justo al lado de la panadería.
translations.fr: Le distributeur est juste à côté de la boulangerie.
translations.it: Il bancomat è proprio accanto alla panetteria.
translations.zh-Hans: 取款机就在面包店旁边。
translations.yue: 提款機就喺麵包店隔離。
translations.pt: O caixa eletrônico fica bem ao lado da padaria.
translations.vi: Cây ATM nằm ngay cạnh tiệm bánh.
translations.ar: جهاز الصراف يقع بجانب المخبز مباشرةً.
translations.nl: De geldautomaat staat vlak naast de bakker.
translations.hu: Az ATM közvetlenül a pékség mellett van.
translations.hi: एटीएम बेकरी के ठीक बगल में है।
translations.el: Το ATM είναι ακριβώς δίπλα στον φούρνο.
translations.nb: Minibanken ligger rett ved siden av bakeriet.
translations.id: ATM tepat di sebelah toko roti.
translations.da: Hæveautomaten ligger lige ved siden af bageren.
translations.ja: ATMはパン屋のすぐ隣にあります。
